title: Artanthe lentaginoides

intro: Artanthe lentaginoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as a member of the custard apple family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Artanthe lentaginoides include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
